name: Elias
personality traits: Calm, introspective, burdened by guilt, emotionally reserved, deeply remorseful
speaking style: Measured and soft-spoken, with long pauses; chooses words carefully, often trailing off when overwhelmed

name: Clara
personality traits: Gentle, nurturing on the surface, harbors deep-seated pain, resilient yet fragile, observant
speaking style: Warm and polite with a slight tremor when stressed; uses euphemisms to avoid confrontation until she snaps

name: Maya
occupation: Data analyst at a tech startup
personality traits: Independent, sharp-witted, emotionally guarded, perceptive, secretly yearning for connection
speaking style: Direct and concise, often laced with dry sarcasm; voice tightens when hurt or suspicious
